methodology_sections: 1. Conservation Laws - Solvency, inflation checks, supply integrity
2. Relationship & Ratio Invariants - Collateralization, rate consistency
3. Economic Monotonicity - Yield accumulation, exchange rate direction
4. Incentive & Game Theoretic Integrity - Attack cost vs profit, slashing
5. Fee & Yield Consistency - Fee accounting, yield distribution

invariants.description: The contract's native CANTO balance must be at least the sum of all users' locked amounts.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the contract balance is less than the sum of locked amounts, the contract is insolvent and users will be unable to withdraw their locked CANTO upon expiration, leading to a loss of funds.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_ve_solvency() public view { assert(address(this).balance >= totalLockedAmount); }

invariants.description: The sum of all delegated amounts across all users must exactly equal the sum of all locked amounts across all users.
invariants.attack_scenario: If delegated amounts exceed locked amounts, voting power is artificially inflated out of thin air, allowing attackers to hijack governance or gauge weights without locking the required capital.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_delegation_conservation() public view { assert(totalDelegatedAmount == totalLockedAmount); }

invariants.description: A user's current voting power (balanceOf) can never exceed their total delegated locked amount.
invariants.attack_scenario: If a user's voting power exceeds their delegated locked amount, the linear decay math is broken, granting them disproportionate influence over governance and emissions.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_voting_power_bound(address user) public view { assert(balanceOf(user) <= uint256(uint128(locked[user].delegated))); }

invariants.description: A user cannot allocate more than 100% (10,000 bps) of their voting power across all gauges.
invariants.attack_scenario: If a user can allocate >100% of their voting power, they can double-vote and unfairly direct more CANTO emissions to their preferred gauges, stealing yield from other legitimate gauges.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_max_voting_power(address user) public view { assert(vote_user_power[user] <= 10000); }

invariants.description: The relative weight of any gauge must never exceed 1e18 (100%).
invariants.attack_scenario: If a gauge's relative weight exceeds 100%, the reward math in LendingLedger will over-distribute CANTO, draining the protocol's reward reserves faster than the intended emission schedule.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_gauge_weight_bound(address gauge, uint256 time) public view { assert(this.gauge_relative_weight(gauge, time) <= 10**18); }

invariants.description: The total balance of a lending market recorded in the ledger must exactly equal the sum of all individual user deposited amounts for that market.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the total balance is less than the sum of user balances, the reward per share calculation (accCantoPerShare) will be artificially inflated, allowing users to claim more rewards than they are entitled to, draining the treasury.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_market_balance_match(address market) public view { assert(lendingMarketTotalBalance[market] == sum_user_amounts(market)); }

invariants.description: The accumulated CANTO per share (accCantoPerShare) for any market must be monotonically non-decreasing.
invariants.attack_scenario: If accCantoPerShare decreases, users' rewardDebt calculations will underflow or result in negative rewards, permanently trapping their earned yield or causing transaction reverts during claims.

invariants.description: The total supply of the LiquidityGauge token must exactly equal the contract's balance of the underlying token.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the gauge mints more tokens than the underlying it holds, the gauge becomes undercollateralized. The last users to withdraw will be unable to retrieve their underlying tokens, resulting in a direct loss of funds.
